ValidationRule.description: This checks if Send Dmart HAnds Service is TRUE the Smart Hands Time(Time_of_Smart_Hands_Arrival__c) is Required
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT ( $Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_Opportunity_Validation_Rules__c ) && OR(( Send_Smart_Hands_Service__c && ISBLANK( TEXT( Time_of_Smart_Hands_Tech_Arrival__c) )), Send_Smart_Hands_Service__c = false && NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Time_of_Smart_Hands_Tech_Arrival__c) )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Time of Smart Hands Tech Arrival is required only when Send Smart Hands Service is checked
